title: Application - Fresh install mobile application
scenario: Fresh install of Poly Studio Mobile app from Play Store/App Store completes successfully and user can start onboarding
steps: 1. Uninstall the Poly Studio Mobile app from the device.
2. Open the Google Play Store (Android) or App Store (iOS).
3. Search for "Poly Studio Mobile" and select the app from the search results.
4. Tap "Install" (Android) or "Get" (iOS) to download and install the app.
5. Wait for the installation to complete.
6. Tap "Open" to launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Observe the initial screen that appears after launch.
expected: The app installs successfully without errors. Upon launching, the user is presented with the onboarding/startup screen (e.g., welcome screen, terms of service, or device pairing prompt) indicating a fresh install experience.
